description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a dark gray exterior and white trim, featuring a prominent gable roof and multiple dormer windows. The front of the house includes a covered porch with white railings, a set of stairs, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. The property is landscaped with palm trees, shrubs, and a small deciduous tree, adding to its suburban appeal. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture and surfboards, accessible by a staircase. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a bay window on one side and standard rectangular windows throughout. A detached small shed or outbuilding is positioned behind the house, and a car is parked in the driveway.
description: A two-story gray house with a gable roof, front porch, attached garage, and landscaped yard with palm trees and a rear deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entry, garage, driveway, and two palm trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bay window, garage, car, and dense landscaping along the house's length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, outdoor furniture, surfboards, stairs, and detached shed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the car, more windows, and the shed positioned away from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay window and dormers
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white railings, steps, and a central door flanked by columns
